title: bidens cernua var. ligulata
intro: Bidens cernua var. ligulata, also known as the fringe tickseed or yellowish fringe tickseed, is a perennial plant belonging to the aster family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant has been used to promote health and wellness, with potential benefits including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, Bidens cernua var. ligulata has been prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
